message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2013","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12188","justification":"National election study focused on political behaviour, attitudes, media use, and campaign dynamics in Germany around the 2013 federal election; fits media–politics–behaviour theme in the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13123","justification":"Election campaign study in Germany covering political attitudes, behaviour, party preferences, and media exposure in 2017; aligns with political behaviour and media within German political system in the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Campaign Panel 2009–2013–2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13519","justification":"Panel design across multiple election years, contains detailed measures of political behaviour, attitudes, participation, and media use in Germany, overlapping the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Short-term Campaign Panel 2013","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12187","justification":"Short-term campaign panel in Germany in 2013 with rich information on political opinions, party evaluations, government assessments, and media consumption."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Citizens Long-term Panel 2013–2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13287","justification":"Long-term citizen panel in Germany following individuals’ political attitudes, behaviour, trust in institutions, and media use between 2013 and 2017."},{"title":"Political Participation and Electoral Behaviour in Germany 2014","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5859","justification":"GESIS study on political participation, electoral behaviour, and political attitudes in Germany around 2014, including information related to government and political system evaluations."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), EU Election Campaign Survey 2014","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5850","justification":"Survey on the 2014 European Parliament election in Germany, covering political behaviour, EU and national politics attitudes, and media use during the campaign."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Media Use in Germany 2011","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5560","justification":"National survey including political attitudes, forms of participation, trust in government and institutions, and various aspects of media use in Germany at the start of the 2010s."},{"title":"Media Use and Political Information in Germany 2013","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5711","justification":"Study focused on how citizens in Germany use media to obtain political information, with measures of political interest, attitudes toward politics, and evaluations of political institutions."},{"title":"Political Communication in Germany 2017: Media Use and Political Attitudes","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6800","justification":"Dataset on media use, political communication, and political attitudes in Germany in 2017, directly linking media consumption to political behaviour and perceptions of the political system."}]}
